summary: Completed comprehensive testing of language switching functionality (EN/ES) for Telit Cinterion B2B presentation website. All language switching features work perfectly including selector visibility, default state, content translation, and section integrity.
passed_tests: Language selector (EN/ES) is visible in navigation bar with correct data-testids
EN is default active language with white background styling
ES button correctly switches hero text to Spanish: 'Un sitio web no puede ganar' and 'tres mercados.'
ES button changes all nav items to Spanish (El Cambio, Problema, Oportunidad, Propuesta, Fases, Modelo)
ES button changes CTA button text to 'Hablemos'
EN button switches all content back to English correctly
All 13 sections (hero, shift, problem, opportunity, proposal, build, strategic, howwework, phases, deliverables, model, why, closing) render correctly after language switching
Language button active/inactive states work properly (white background for active, gray text for inactive)
React Context language switching implementation functions seamlessly
No console errors or JavaScript issues during language switching
